summary: Deployable DFlash routing via an online whole-cycle drafter-confidence gate. The drafter depth-1 confidence predicts acceptance (corr 0.705); gating spec-vs-AR per cycle on it lifts the 27B 9-prompt suite from 1.027x all-chain to 1.147x exact, with NO prompt history (vs the non-deployable offline profile-route 1.35x).

oracle.note: p1 = drafter depth-1 top-1 softmax prob (--draft-top-k 2). High p1 -> high P(accept>=1).

gate.mechanism: HIPENGINE_DFLASH_WHOLE_CYCLE_GATE=thr: if drafter depth-1 p1 < thr, drop the whole cycle to AR (verify root only); else run the full chain. Whole-cycle (no mid-chain truncation), unlike --draft-p-min.
gate.vs_offline_profile_route: 1.35x (non-deployable; needs prior per-prompt history). The confidence gate captures ~half the gain but is fully online/deployable.
gate.why_draft_p_min_hurts: _confidence_limited_active_count truncates the chain mid-stream (cuts good deeper drafts) -> 0.92x at p_min=0.8. The whole-cycle gate keeps the full chain when confident.

next: Promote the env gate to a CLI flag and into the engine DFlash decode API; per-model threshold calibration via the oracle (clean-separation point ~0.9 here).
